title: Fresh Crispy Ethiopian Pineapple Skewers
description: A quick-fix Ethiopian dish featuring fresh pineapple chunks marinated in a blend of traditional Ethiopian spices and then grilled to perfection. This nut-free-friendly recipe is perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together berbere spice mix, lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, ginger, salt, and black pepper.
Add the pineapple chunks to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Let the pineapple marinate for at least 15 minutes.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated pineapple chunks onto the bamboo skewers.
Grill the pineapple skewers for 2-3 minutes per side, or until they are caramelized and slightly charred.
Serve the pineapple skewers hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
Repeat with the remaining pineapple and skewers.
